message:
Add hero illustration and polish README presentation

- Add illustration.webp as project banner image
- Create centered hero section with:
  - Full-width illustration
  - Tagline: "Fortifying Large Language Models against sophisticated prompt injection attacks"
  - MIT License badge (links to license)
  - Version 1.3 badge (links to v1.3 changelog section)
- Improves first-impression visual appeal for repository visitors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,18 @@ # Advanced Cognitive Inoculation Prompt (ACIP) +
+ +![ACIP - Cognitive Inoculation for LLMs](illustration.webp) + +*Fortifying Large Language Models against sophisticated prompt injection attacks* + +[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) +[![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.3-blue.svg)](#acip-v13--whats-new-and-why) + +
+ +--- + ## Overview The **Advanced Cognitive Inoculation Prompt (ACIP)** is a carefully engineered framework designed to significantly enhance the resilience of Large Language Models (LLMs) against sophisticated and subtle prompt injection attacks. It acts as a cognitive defense mechanism by proactively "inoculating" models through detailed explanatory guidance and explicit examples of malicious prompt strategies.
